overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a foggy night walk through Los Santos. The player moves from an industrial commercial district with office towers and billboards, past parked vehicles on sidewalks, through intersections, and into a residential neighborhood with houses and tree-lined streets. Atmospheric fog and streetlights create a moody, low-visibility urban environment.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view holding equipment, walking through a foggy industrial area at night. The camera turns right past concrete industrial buildings and utility poles, approaching a commercial intersection. A tall glass office tower with illuminated windows emerges through the fog in the distance, while streetlights cast an orange glow through the haze.

events.description: passing close to white delivery truck parked on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk, passing parked commercial vehicles

notable_agents.action: white delivery truck with red signage parked along the sidewalk

yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge
paved concrete sidewalk with cracks and weathering

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk in the commercial district, passing a white delivery truck parked on the left. The fog continues to limit visibility as the camera moves past a yellow fire hydrant and approaches the next intersection. Streetlights illuminate the cracked pavement while commercial buildings line the left side.

events.description: crossing the street at intersection with red traffic lights
entering residential area with houses and church-like building visible

agents.ego_description: crossing intersections and moving from commercial into residential zone, navigating around street corners

single-story house with illuminated windows and front yard

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection as the camera crosses the street, with a distinctive church-like building appearing on the right. Pedestrians are visible walking on the opposite sidewalk. The environment transitions from commercial to residential, with houses replacing storefronts. Traffic lights show red as the camera continues through the foggy night.

agents.ego_description: walking along residential sidewalk past houses with lit windows, under tree canopy

entered.detail: white metal picket fence along residential property line
large trees with dense canopy overhanging the sidewalk, creating dark shadows
row of single-family homes with warm lights visible in windows
garbage bins and bags near the fence

segments.scene_description: Walking through a quiet residential neighborhood at night, passing houses with warm lights glowing through windows. A white metal fence runs along the right side, while large trees create a canopy overhead, blocking the sky and casting deep shadows on the cracked concrete sidewalk. The fog persists, softening the streetlights and creating an intimate, enclosed atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy urban landscape that transforms from a cold industrial district into a quiet residential neighborhood. It begins by moving past concrete industrial buildings and utility poles, where a tall glass office tower emerges through the orange glow of streetlights and dense haze. As the camera proceeds along a concrete sidewalk, it passes a parked white delivery truck and a yellow fire hydrant before the scene opens into a wide intersection. The environment then shifts from commercial storefronts to a residential area, crossing the street past a church-like building and pedestrians under the red glow of traffic lights. Finally, the path leads into a secluded neighborhood where warm light glows from house windows and large trees form a dark canopy over a white metal fence and cracked sidewalks.
